english_text:
Cycle of Revelation (Daur Kashf)
Qa'im of the Cycle of Revelation
50,000 Years = 7000 × 7 = 49,000 + 1,000
42,000
7000
alt_text: Identical to image 010: six numbered chairs (1-6) labeled 7000 each, totaling 42,000, with arrows pointing to a seventh chair labeled '7' (7000) below — captioned 'قائم دور کشف' (Qa'im of the Cycle of Revelation). Math at top: 50,000 Years = 7000 × 7 = 49,000 + 1,000.
notes: Duplicate of image 010 — the source HTML embedded the same diagram twice. The tool faithfully extracts each inline base64 occurrence. Phase 0b refinement could dedupe if appropriate, but for provenance fidelity we keep both.
